supply_chain.dependencies: Circle provides creation and redemption services for USDC, including operational capabilities required for USDC customer-facing services. If Circle fails to provide certain operational services, ability to maintain current level of offerings and customer experience for USDC could be harmed.
supply_chain.risks: Loss of critical banking or insurance relationship could adversely affect business. Reliance on third-party service providers for certain aspects of operations. Banking partners view company as higher risk customer. May face difficulty establishing or maintaining banking relationships due to instability in global banking system, increasing regulatory uncertainty and scrutiny.

regulatory_risks: Extensive, highly-evolving and uncertain regulatory landscape for crypto assets
Money transmission, stored value, and virtual currency business activity regulations
Securities regulations - SEC allegations that certain crypto assets and staking services are unregistered securities
Commodities and derivatives regulations - CFTC oversight of crypto assets as commodities
Economic and trade sanctions - OFAC compliance requirements
Anti-money laundering and counter-terrorist financing laws (Bank Secrecy Act)
Consumer protection regulations - FTC, CFPB oversight
Privacy and data protection laws - GDPR, CCPA and state privacy laws
State securities regulators actions regarding staking services
MiCA (Markets in Crypto-Assets Regulation) in European Union
Travel Rule requirements for crypto asset exchanges
Pillar Two global minimum tax (15%) on companies
Tax information reporting for digital assets - Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act
Potential SEC amendments to Rule 3b-16 under Exchange Act
NYDFS guidance on virtual currency business entities
Proposed FinCEN rule on virtual currency mixing
State lending laws and licensure requirements
Card association and payment network rules
Interchange fee regulations
Prepaid card regulations
Escheatment and unclaimed property regulations
Prohibitions on bribery and anti-corruption (FCPA, UK Bribery Act)
Export control regulations
Antitrust and competition regulations
Environmental, social, and governance (ESG) requirements
AI and predictive data analytics regulations
Conflicts of interest regulations for broker-dealers and investment advisers

high_risk_countries: Ukraine (Crimea Region, Donetsk People's Republic, Luhansk People's Republic)
sanction_risks: OFAC sanctions compliance - restrictions on dealings with sanctioned jurisdictions and persons
Russia and Belarus sanctions due to Ukraine invasion
Comprehensive embargoes on Crimea Region, Donetsk People's Republic, Luhansk People's Republic, Cuba, Iran, North Korea, and Syria
Risk of inadvertently providing access to sanctioned parties or jurisdictions
Potential for additional sanctions on Russia and Belarus
Exposure from continued activity in Russia and Belarus
Sanctions-related inquiries and voluntary disclosures to OFAC under review
